title: Belt Clip Badge Holder Stainless Steel Tactical Heavy Gauge Leather Made In USA

Belt Clip Badge Holder Stainless Steel Tactical Heavy Gauge Leather Made In USA

This Badge Belt Clip is constructed from durable heavy gauge leather, not some flimsy nylon that falls apart in two weeks. It secures your badge to your shirt pocket or belt with the strong, stainless steel clip. No plastic here.

This one will hold up to long hours in tough conditions. Made from 100% genuine leather, this high quality, lightweight, pin-back police badge holder features reinforced stitching, a strong stainless steel tension back clip and stiff stainless steel snap closure, making it highly durable and able to withstand rough and demanding conditions.

Key Features

  • POLICE BELT CLIP BADGE HOLDER: Universal fit for standard department issue police badges with pin clip backing
  • SIMPLE AND SECURE BADGE MOUNTING: A universal fit, the badge holder measures 4 inches tall and should work with most badge types; to mount your badge, open the snap closure, unfold the badge holder and feed the pin through the two punches and secure
  • 100% GENUINE LEATHER MATERIAL: Badge Belt Clip ID Holder is constructed from heavy gauge, genuine leather, making it a durable and long lasting
  • STAINLESS STEEL TENSION BACK CLIP: Exceptionally strong and sturdy, the back of the police badge holder features a metal tension clip so you can attach it to a belt, pant pocket or any kind of strap; it also features a stainless steel snap closure to ensure the badge holder securely closes and remains fixed
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4 inches; Color: Black; Material: 100% genuine leather; Mounting: Pin-back style badges only

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BB_C1-911
  • UPC: 802827082098
  • Color: Black
  • Size: One Size

The classic and minimalist design of the ASR Federal police badge holder is simple, meant to hold and secure a police badge on your person (belt, waist line, or jacket pocket), so you don't have to reach for or carry a wallet, case or lanyard ID holder. This particular ASR Federal police badge holder is especially great if you're a security professional who is constantly on the move; knowing your badge is secure and within reach when you need to access it is paramount.

Universal badge fit; pin-back mounting.

NOTE: Badge NOT included with included purchase; Please see photos for measurements to ensure this badge holder will fit the specific dimensions of your own personal badge!
